assets_checked.name: Mortgage Affordability Widget

widget_works.detail: Page renders with calculator component, prerendered by Next.js

embed_code_works.detail: CSP frame-ancestors * set on /embed/*. Verified working after Vercel deploy.

no_signup_claim_true.detail: No signup required — calculator loads immediately, no auth gate

no_personal_data_stored_claim.detail: All calculations client-side, no user data collection visible

copy_paste_instructions_clear.detail: Embed code provided in outreach scripts — one-line iframe HTML

publisher_use_cases_visible.detail: Landing page describes widget use cases for publishers

critical_issues: FIXED: Global X-Frame-Options removed, CSP frame-ancestors * set on embed routes

fix_required.solution: Add X-Frame-Options header override for embed routes. Options: (1) vercel.json headers config, (2) next.config.ts headers() function, (3) embed layout generateMetadata. Set to ALLOWALL or use Content-Security-Policy: frame-ancestors *.

critical_issues: FIXED: Same fix as mortgage widget

fix_required.solution: Same fix as mortgage widget — global header override for embed paths

action_required: Fix x-frame-options: DENY on all embed routes before sending any widget outreach. Without this fix, 100% of widget pitches will result in broken embeds.
verification_plan: After fix: curl -sI embed URLs, confirm X-Frame-Options is absent or set to allow. Test actual iframe embed in a test HTML file.
